news_items.headline: Series Preview: Twins at Guardians
news_items.summary: The peak point of frustration for me this 2026 Guardians’ season was their recent series loss in Minnesota. Now, the Twins come to Cleveland. Joy. The Twins are 49-51 with a -24 run differential, sixth in wRC+ at 105, 29th in baserunning runs abover average at -6.1, 27th in baserunning runs above average -27.1, 16th […]

news_items.headline: Jose Altuve: 15 Years of Memories 15 Years After His Astros MLB Debut
news_items.summary: It was a Wednesday afternoon at then-named Minute Maid Park. On July 20, 2011, Jose Altuve made his MLB debut with the Houston Astros. He went 1×5 in a 3-2 victory over the Washington Nationals in 11 innings. He got his first major league hit with 2 out in the bottom of the 9th inning […]
